examples: The subfamily Bocchinae is firstly recorded from China.
The cockatiel is in the same subfamily (Cacatuinae) as the larger cockatoo.
A scientific name of taxon at the rank of subfamily. Such names have the suffix -inae.
Tiger, Lion, Jaguar, and Leopard all come from the subfamily known as Pantherinae.
Cheetah comes from the other still-living subfamily, Felinae.
